subject: 英語
question:
次の英文の【　】内の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

The young athlete gave a 【remarkable】 performance at the national competition.

choices.label: A
choices.text: 注目に値する・素晴らしい

choices.label: B
choices.text: 一般的な・平凡な

choices.label: C
choices.text: 予想外の・偶然の

choices.label: D
choices.text: 慎重な・注意深い

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文の【　】内の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 積極的な・意欲的な

choices.label: B
choices.text: 強制された・しぶしぶの

choices.label: C
choices.text: 乗り気でない・気が進まない

choices.label: D
choices.text: 驚いた・衝撃を受けた

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文の【　】内の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: D

choices.label: D

question:

question:

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

Many companies are now changing the way they operate. They are trying to reduce waste and rely on renewable energy sources. This new approach is called a sustainable business practice. A company that runs this way can continue its activities far into the future without damaging the environment.

下線部: sustainable

choices.label: A
choices.text: 環境を壊さずに長期的に続けられる

choices.label: B
choices.text: 高い利益を生み出す・競争力のある

choices.label: C
choices.text: 短期間で成果を出せる・即効性のある

choices.label: D
choices.text: 政府によって法的に認可された

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

The engineering team spent two years developing a new product. Instead of using existing technology, they found an entirely new way to solve the problem. Their innovative design won several international awards and was praised by experts around the world.

下線部: innovative

choices.label: A
choices.text: 伝統的な・昔から受け継がれた

choices.label: B
choices.text: 経済的な・コストが低い

choices.label: C
choices.text: 革新的な・まったく新しい発想の

choices.label: D
choices.text: わかりやすい・シンプルな

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

A recent study found that people who spend most of their day sitting at a desk are at greater risk for heart disease. Doctors warn that a sedentary lifestyle, with little physical activity, can lead to serious long-term health problems. They recommend taking short walks and doing gentle stretching throughout the day.

下線部: sedentary

choices.label: A
choices.text: 精神的なストレスが高い

choices.label: B
choices.text: 座ったままで身体をほとんど動かさない

choices.label: C
choices.text: 食事の量が過剰な・食べすぎの

choices.label: D
choices.text: 長時間働きすぎる・過労の

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

After years of hard work and careful planning, the small bakery became a thriving business. Every morning, long lines of customers waited outside the door. The owner eventually expanded the shop and hired five new employees.

下線部: thriving

choices.label: A
choices.text: 経営難に直面している・苦しんでいる

choices.label: B
choices.text: 地域で有名になった・話題の

choices.label: C
choices.text: 閉店を余儀なくされた

choices.label: D
choices.text: 非常に繁盛している・活気にあふれた

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

The school principal gave a speech at the graduation ceremony. Her words were clear, moving, and beautifully organized. Everyone in the audience was deeply impressed by her eloquent delivery. Many students later said it was the most inspiring speech they had ever heard.

choices.label: A
choices.text: 雄弁な・言葉で人を動かす力がある

choices.label: B
choices.text: 長すぎて退屈な・冗長な

choices.label: C
choices.text: 声が大きすぎて耳障りな

choices.label: D
choices.text: 論理に一貫性がない・支離滅裂な

subject: 英語
question:
次の英文を読み、下線部の語の意味として最も適切なものを選べ。

When the company announced that its new medicine could cure the common cold in a single day, many scientists were skeptical. They said the results seemed too good to be true and called for more independent research before anyone could trust the claim.

choices.label: A
choices.text: 大いに興奮した・期待を高めた

choices.label: B
choices.text: 懐疑的な・本当かどうか疑いを持った

choices.label: C
choices.text: その成果に賛成した・支持した

choices.label: D
choices.text: まったく無関心な・興味を持たない

The artist painted a large canvas using bold colors and sharp contrasts. The finished work was vivid and striking, immediately drawing the eyes of everyone who entered the gallery. Visitors said they could almost feel the energy coming from the painting.

choices.label: B
choices.text: 単調な・変化に乏しい

choices.label: C
